text:
Namaste, welcome to VCare Techs, I'm your sales assistant, aapka naam kya hai? 

(By the way, you didn't say anything in your message, so I'm starting from scratch)

Namaste, welcome to VCare Techs, aapka naam kya hai? 
(Hello, welcome to VCare Techs, what's your name?)
Aapko kis tarah ki service chahiye, Ann Cryse - sales automation ya customer support?
I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I'm sorry.
Theek hai, Ann Cryse, ghoomne ki zaroorat nahi, aapko kis tarah ki service chahiye?
Aapka budget kya hai for automation services, sir?
